meaning: n.(西班牙)绅士,骑师,(美国西南部)骑手,(贵)妇人的护卫(或陪伴)
examples: He was afraid that Caballero was not up to the situation.
"The world can be a dangerous place," says Caballero as he demonstrates his products - by shooting live bullets at his lawyer.
Miguel Caballero, the tailor who made Ruiz's coat, turns out over $3 million worth of bulletproof clothing every year from his Bogota factory.
If Mr Caballero is right, America is also less vulnerable to a sudden run on its securities.
On Thursday, Bloomberg News reported that Mr. Caballero had raised concerns about the antenna to Mr. Jobs.
